description: Address the top-priority UX gaps in the hex-nexus Solid.js dashboard: add a Workplan/Plan panel, a natural-language Hey Hex input, a Brain Validate status panel, unread inbox badge, TaskDAG interactivity, and visual polish for information density.

phases.description: Show a live unread count badge on the Inbox nav item in the left sidebar. Drive it from the agentInbox SpacetimeDB signal: count items where acknowledged_at is null. Use a red pill badge capped at '99+' for priority-2 items and a gray pill for lower-priority unread counts. No new API calls needed — data is already subscribed.

tasks.description: Derive `unreadCount` and `criticalCount` createMemo signals from `agentInbox()` reactive store. Filter acknowledged_at === null for unread, priority === 2 for critical.
tasks.title: Add unreadCount memo in App.tsx

tasks.description: Overlay a small pill badge (absolute-positioned) on the Inbox nav button. Red for criticalCount > 0, gray for generic unread. Collapsed sidebar shows badge only; expanded sidebar shows badge inline after label text.
tasks.title: Render badge on Inbox sidebar button

phases.title: Unread Inbox Badge on Sidebar Nav Item

phases.description: Add a new 'Plans' route (page: 'workplans') that fetches /api/plan/list and /api/plan/status from hex-nexus. Display each workplan as a card: name, status chip (draft/active/completed/paused), phase progress bar, last-updated timestamp. Link each card to hex plan status detail. Poll every 15s; show a spinner on first load and a 'No active plans' empty state.

tasks.description: New file src/components/views/WorkplanListView.tsx. Fetch GET /api/plan/list on mount + 15s interval via setInterval. Render cards with status chip colors: active=cyan, completed=green, paused=yellow, draft=gray.
tasks.title: Create WorkplanListView component

tasks.description: Add { page: 'workplans' } to the Route union type in router.ts. Add a 'Plans' entry in the sidebar (between Projects and Agent Fleet). Lazy-import WorkplanListView in App.tsx.
tasks.title: Wire router + sidebar nav entry

phases.title: Workplan Panel — Plan Status & Reconcile View

phases.description: Add a persistent 'Hey Hex' input bar at the bottom of the dashboard (above the BottomBar). On submit, POST to /api/chat/send or dispatch via the existing chat store. Visually distinct from the full ChatView — this is a single-line quick-dispatch, not a conversation view. Show a subtle 'Thinking...' indicator while the request is in flight.

tasks.description: New file src/components/layout/HeyHexBar.tsx. Single-line input with Cmd+Space or '>' prefix trigger. POST payload: { message, project_id: activeProjectId() }. On success, open InboxPanel or ChatView to show the response.
tasks.title: Create HeyHexBar component

tasks.description: Insert <HeyHexBar /> in App.tsx layout, below the main content flex area, above <BottomBar />. Add keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Space to focus it from anywhere (skip if active element is input/textarea).
tasks.title: Mount HeyHexBar between main content and BottomBar

phases.title: Hey Hex — Natural Language Input Widget

phases.description: Add a collapsible 'System Health' panel in the ControlPlane view (or as a sidebar widget) that polls GET /api/validate or runs hex validate via nexus REST. Display result categories: CLI wiring, binary freshness, workplan consistency, MCP parity, worktree health. Each line is a pass/fail row with an icon. Poll on mount + every 60s. Show 'Last checked Xs ago' timestamp.

tasks.description: New file src/components/system/BrainValidatePanel.tsx. Poll GET /api/validate (or /api/nexus/status as fallback). Render a collapsible <details> section with pass/fail rows. Collapsed by default; auto-expand on any failure.
tasks.title: Create BrainValidatePanel component

tasks.description: Import BrainValidatePanel into src/components/views/ControlPlane.tsx and render it in the top-right quadrant, replacing the current placeholder space.
tasks.title: Embed panel in ControlPlane view

phases.title: Brain Validate Status Panel

phases.description: The TaskDAG SVG nodes are clickable but the click handler fires with no visible output. Wire the existing handleNodeClick to open an inline popover (or a slide-over panel) showing: task title, status, assigned agent ID (truncated), depends_on list, timestamps. Use a Portal-rendered div positioned near the clicked node. Close on Escape or outside click.

tasks.description: New file src/components/swarm/TaskNodePopover.tsx. Receives a TaskNode and a bounding rect. Renders an absolute-positioned card with task details. Accessible: role=dialog, aria-modal=true, focus-trapped.
tasks.title: Add TaskNodePopover component

tasks.description: In TaskDAG.tsx, track selectedNode signal. On node click, set selectedNode + compute bounding rect from SVG coordinates. Render <TaskNodePopover /> via Portal. Clear on Escape keydown or backdrop click.
tasks.title: Wire popover into TaskDAG

phases.title: TaskDAG Node Detail Popover

phases.description: The dashboard uses inconsistent text sizing (text-[9px], text-[10px], text-[11px], text-xs all mixed). Standardize to a 3-level scale: label=text-[10px], body=text-xs (12px), heading=text-sm (14px). Replace raw gray-300 on fallback/empty text with gray-500 for proper dark-theme contrast. Add a connection-state color ring to the SpacetimeDB module cards (cyan pulse animation when connected). Add aria-live='polite' to the SwarmTimeline list so screen readers announce new events.

tasks.description: Update SwarmMonitor, SwarmTimeline, SwarmHeader, TaskDAG, InboxPanel to use consistent text sizing classes. Remove all text-[9px] instances; use text-[10px] only for badges/labels.
tasks.title: Standardize type scale across swarm components

tasks.description: Change all 'text-gray-300' used on empty/fallback strings to 'text-gray-500'. Add aria-live='polite' to SwarmTimeline's event list container. Add aria-label to priority badge spans in InboxPanel.
tasks.title: Fix empty-state text contrast and aria-live

phases.title: Visual Density & Color Consistency Pass

phases.description: SwarmHeader.detectPhase() infers lifecycle phase from completion ratio (0%, 20%, 70%, 100%) which produces incorrect labels when tasks are out of order or a swarm is paused. Replace with an explicit `phase` field from the swarm SpacetimeDB record if present, falling back to the ratio heuristic only when the field is absent. Also show the topology value (pipeline/mesh/hierarchical) as a small chip next to the swarm name.

tasks.description: Update SwarmHeader to accept an optional `phase` prop (string). If set, map it to the PHASES array directly. Keep detectPhase() as fallback. Show topology chip using existing border styling.
tasks.title: Read swarm.phase field in SwarmHeader

phases.title: Phase detect heuristic replacement in SwarmHeader

phases.description: Rebuild hex-nexus to bake updated assets into the binary. Run cargo check --workspace, start nexus, verify each new panel loads without console errors. Confirm SpacetimeDB subscriptions still work after the component changes.

tasks.description: Run `cd hex-nexus && cargo build` after Vite build. Hard-refresh dashboard. Check browser console for errors on each new route.
tasks.title: Rebuild hex-nexus assets

phases.title: Rebuild and smoke test

title: Dashboard UX Improvements
